# Commerce Media Consulting Group (CMCG)

> Commerce Media Consulting Group is a B2B go-to-market (GTM) advisory firm led by Managing Partner Don Knapp. It helps CEOs and CROs at companies with $2M–$40M in revenue turn unpredictable, chaotic go-to-market motions into a repeatable revenue system using a proprietary framework called The Revenue Architecture.

## Who it is for
- B2B companies generating between $2M and $40M in revenue
- CEOs, Founders, and CROs who own the go-to-market outcome
- Teams whose product is strong but whose positioning, pipeline, forecast, or sales execution is inconsistent

## The core problem it solves
B2B companies commonly struggle with blurry positioning, a fuzzy ideal customer profile (ICP), marketing content that doesn't move deals, forecasts that swing wildly, and rising customer acquisition cost (CAC) with flat win rates. CMCG fixes these with a single, sequenced operating model rather than disconnected tactics.

## The Revenue Architecture (the framework)
A complete, sequenced GTM operating model built in five parts:
1. Strategic Positioning & Right-to-Win — a differentiated narrative the whole team can deliver.
2. ICP, Personas & Pricing/ROI — focus resources on the highest-LTV/CAC accounts and quantify value.
3. Commercial System & Sales Playbook — codify top-performer behavior; cut ramp time 30–50%.
4. Buyer's-Journey Collateral & Campaigns — content mapped to every stage of the buying decision.
5. Pipeline, Rhythm & Experimentation — data-backed forecasting and a weekly operating rhythm.

## Typical client outcomes
- +34% average win rate increase
- +38% increase in customer retention
- −50% fewer internal meetings (through a tighter operating rhythm)
- First measurable results within ~90 days
- $2.4B+ in cumulative revenue influenced across engagements

## Engagement model and pricing
- Engagements are usually 6 or 12 months.
- Contracted in half-day increments (a half day, a full day, or two to three days a week).
- Monthly investment ranges from $4,500 to $25,000.
- A maximum of four active client engagements at any time.

## About Don Knapp
Don Knapp is the Managing Partner of CMCG. He spent 20+ years in B2B go-to-market leadership as a VP of Sales, CMO, and CRO before building this advisory practice. His differentiator is operator experience: he has sat in the same seat his clients are in now and delivers execution-ready assets, not slide decks.
